complaint_a: Longkang depan sekolah tersumbat, hujan sikit terus banjir.
complaint_b: Drain near the school is blocked again and water rises when it rains.
rationale: Same blocked-drain incident, BM and English wording.

complaint_a: Air naik kat Jalan Melur sebab longkang tak jalan.
complaint_b: Flooding at Jalan Melur, the drainage is clogged.
rationale: Manglish and English describe the same flooding cause.

complaint_a: Jln dpn skolah ada lubang besar, motor almost jatuh.
complaint_b: Big pothole on the road in front of the school; a motorbike nearly fell.
rationale: Abbreviated BM/Manglish and English road-damage report.

complaint_a: Sampah tak kutip dekat flat Blok C dah tiga hari.
complaint_b: Garbage at Block C flats has not been collected for three days.
rationale: Same uncollected-rubbish complaint across languages.

complaint_a: Lampu jalan rosak kat lorong belakang pasar.
complaint_b: Street light is not working at the lane behind the market.
rationale: Direct BM-English paraphrase.

complaint_a: Pokok tumbang tutup satu lane dekat klinik.
complaint_b: A fallen tree is blocking one lane near the clinic.
rationale: Same obstruction, different language.

complaint_a: Longkang rumah no 18 penuh daun dan air tak turun.
complaint_b: Drain by house number 18 is full of leaves and water cannot flow away.
rationale: Specific drainage blockage paraphrase.

complaint_a: Banjir kilat depan kedai mamak selepas hujan 20 minit.
complaint_b: Flash flood outside the mamak shop after a short rain.
rationale: Same local landmark and weather event.

complaint_a: Ada lubang jalan teruk dekat simpang Jalan Kenanga.
complaint_b: Severe road hole at the Jalan Kenanga junction.
rationale: Malay and English description of the same pothole.

complaint_a: Tong sampah overflow beside playground, bau sangat kuat.
complaint_b: The bin beside the playground is overflowing and smells bad.
rationale: Same rubbish incident with code-switching.

complaint_a: Lampu kat zebra crossing sekolah blink blink then mati.
complaint_b: The street light at the school zebra crossing keeps blinking and has gone out.
rationale: Same safety-relevant lighting failure.

complaint_a: Saliran belakang surau tersumbat, nyamuk banyak.
complaint_b: Blocked drainage behind the surau is causing lots of mosquitoes.
rationale: Same drainage complaint, local landmark retained.

complaint_a: Dahan pokok besar jatuh atas jalan near taman permainan.
complaint_b: Large tree branch fell onto the road next to the playground.
rationale: Mixed-language paraphrase of one obstruction.

complaint_a: Kawasan parking hospital banjir lagi malam tadi.
complaint_b: Hospital parking area flooded again last night.
rationale: Same time and place, concise bilingual paraphrase.

complaint_a: Pothole depan kedai runcit makin besar, dangerous for bike.
complaint_b: The road hole in front of the grocery shop is getting bigger and is dangerous for motorcycles.
rationale: Manglish and English report the same worsening pothole.

complaint_a: Pothole near Sekolah Kebangsaan Taman Maju.
complaint_b: Pothole near Hospital Seri Murni.
rationale: Same category but explicitly different locations.

complaint_a: Longkang tersumbat dekat sekolah.
complaint_b: Lampu jalan rosak dekat sekolah.
rationale: Same landmark but different municipal problem categories.

complaint_a: Sampah tak kutip di Blok A pagi ini.
complaint_b: Sampah tak kutip di Blok B pagi ini.
rationale: Very similar wording but different blocks.

complaint_a: Banjir dekat Pasar Besar selepas hujan malam ini.
complaint_b: Banjir dekat terminal bas selepas hujan malam ini.
rationale: Same weather/category but separate locations.

complaint_a: Pokok tumbang dekat klinik, jalan blocked.
complaint_b: Pokok tumbang dekat sekolah, jalan blocked.
rationale: Same category but different incident sites.

complaint_a: Drain blocked behind the surau.
complaint_b: Street lamp broken behind the surau.
rationale: Same landmark, incompatible categories.

complaint_a: Ada lubang besar depan pasar malam.
complaint_b: Ada lubang besar depan stesen minyak.
rationale: Same phrase but distinct landmarks.

complaint_a: Air naik dekat sekolah sebab longkang tersumbat.
complaint_b: Air naik dekat sekolah sebab paip utama bocor.
rationale: Same symptom and location but different likely causes requiring separate review.

complaint_a: Lampu jalan di Jalan Kenanga rosak semalam.
complaint_b: Lampu jalan di Jalan Kenanga rosak dua bulan lepas.
rationale: Semantic match, but the time gap should prevent an incident merge.

complaint_a: Garbage overflowing beside playground A.
complaint_b: Garbage overflowing beside playground B.
rationale: Same category and wording, different named locations.

complaint_a: Jalan berlubang dekat sekolah.
complaint_b: Jalan licin dekat sekolah sebab tumpahan minyak.
rationale: Both road hazards near a school but materially different problems.

complaint_a: Longkang tersumbat dekat Flat C.
complaint_b: Sampah dibuang dalam longkang dekat Flat C.
rationale: Related location but different report purpose: blockage versus illegal dumping.

complaint_a: Fallen branch blocking Jalan Mawar.
complaint_b: Broken traffic light at Jalan Mawar junction.
rationale: Same road but distinct hazards.

complaint_a: Pothole at Jalan Anggerik near block 1.
complaint_b: Pothole at Jalan Anggerik near block 9.
rationale: Same street/category but different sub-locations.

complaint_a: Drain near clinic blocked this morning.
complaint_b: Drain near clinic blocked last December.
rationale: Semantic match, but the time window must distinguish recurring incidents.

complaint_a: Sampah penuh di Blok A, Taman Melur.
complaint_b: Garbage overflowing at Block A in Taman Melur.
rationale: Block and taman abbreviations are equivalent across BM and English.

complaint_a: Jln Ampang dekat hospital ada lubang.
complaint_b: Pothole on Jalan Ampang near the hospital.
rationale: Jln/Jalan normalization with the same road and landmark.

complaint_a: Lampu rosak depan SMK Taman Jaya.
complaint_b: Broken street light outside Sekolah Menengah Kebangsaan Taman Jaya.
rationale: SMK expansion and full school name describe one landmark.

complaint_a: Longkang tersumbat kat Kg Baru selepas hujan.
complaint_b: Blocked drain in Kampung Baru after the rain.
rationale: Kg/Kampung abbreviation and bilingual paraphrase.

complaint_a: Pothole near the market.
complaint_b: Large road hole beside the market.
rationale: Same generic named landmark but deliberately requires review because no exact landmark name is present.

complaint_a: Pothole at Block A Jalan Ampang.
complaint_b: Pothole at Block B Jalan Ampang.
rationale: Adjacent blocks on the same street are explicit conflicting sub-locations.

complaint_a: Pothole on Jalan Ampang near Block A.
complaint_b: Pothole on Jalan Ampang near Block C.
rationale: Same street and category but different block identifiers.

complaint_a: Flood near SK Taman Maju.
complaint_b: Flood near SK Taman Jaya.
rationale: Same category and school type but different named schools.

complaint_a: Broken light at Jalan Melur.
complaint_b: Broken light at Jalan Kenanga.
rationale: Same category but different explicit road names.

complaint_a: Drain blocked at Unit 1 Rumah A.
complaint_b: Drain blocked at Unit 2 Rumah A.
rationale: Same building context but different explicit units.
